law decoherence turns a superposition classical irreversibly — coherence decays e^(−t/τ), von Neumann entropy rises 0 → ln2, and τ shrinks with coupled dimensions; so the more the content-uuid wires the whole, the faster any tampering-superposition is measured into the classical proof.
